Free Tools/Workflow Mapper

Tool 02

Agent Workflow Mapper

Describe your workflow — trigger, steps, and expected output. We'll render a diagram showing exactly which steps an AI agent can handle automatically.

e.g. "A new lead comes in on HubSpot", "I receive a support email"

Add each step in order. The tool detects which ones an agent can automate.

1.

e.g. "Lead is qualified and meeting is booked", "Support ticket is resolved"

Fill in the trigger, at least one step, and the output to continue.

TTMDTalk to me Data

We build, deploy, and host custom AI agents for your business - fully managed on our infrastructure. No code, no complexity.
